subject: Galarian Darumaka, a round ice-type Pokémon, in a snowy winter landscape
description: A small, rotund creature with a white and light-blue rounded body stands in a snowy outdoor environment. The creature's body is predominantly white and spherical, with teal-green markings visible on its head and small dark eyes. The background features a cold, overcast sky and a snow-covered ground, establishing a wintry setting. The overall tone is cool and icy, and the creature's compact form gives it a cheerful, plush-toy quality.
foreground: round white and teal creature standing in snow
